title: Migrate 3 consumers data-source->connector; drop data-source kind

test.detail: 73 across capabilities/runner-capabilities-block/runner-prompt-substitution/metadata/docs-consistency/seed; full suite zero new failures vs the 5 pre-existing; grep confirms no live data-source usage (src refs are comments only; no manifest uses it). typecheck clean.

codexReview.detail: mechanical shared-structure deletion+migration; no novel logic (connector logic already codex-approved in C1-C4); gated by the deterministic resolver/metadata/docs-consistency suite + a grep proof of no live data-source. Logged per the no-silent-caps calibration.
